keyword_groups.label: prädiktive Algorithmen – Sturzrisiko
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: fall risk prediction machine learning nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Accidental Falls"[MeSH Terms] OR "fall risk"[Title/Abstract] OR "fall prevention"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("machine learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "deep learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "algorithm"[Title/Abstract] OR "predictive model"[Title/Abstract] OR nursing[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: prädiktive Algorithmen – Dekubitus und Wunden
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: pressure ulcer prediction machine learning nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Pressure Ulcer"[MeSH Terms] OR "pressure injury"[Title/Abstract] OR "pressure ulcer"[Title/Abstract] OR "decubitus"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("machine learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "predictive model"[Title/Abstract] OR "algorithm"[Title/Abstract] OR "neural network"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: prädiktive Algorithmen – Dienstplanung und Personalbedarfsermittlung
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Nursing Staff"[MeSH Terms] OR "Personnel Staffing and Scheduling"[MeSH Terms] OR "nurse staffing"[Title/Abstract] OR "nurse scheduling"[Title/Abstract] OR "workforce planning"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("machine learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "optimization"[Title/Abstract] OR "algorithm"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: prädiktive Algorithmen – Frühwarnsysteme (Sepsis, Verschlechterung)
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: sepsis early warning machine learning clinical deterioration
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Sepsis"[MeSH Terms] OR "early warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "clinical deterioration"[Title/Abstract] OR "rapid response"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("machine learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "predictive model"[Title/Abstract] OR "algorithm"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR hospital[Title/Abstract] OR "intensive care"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: Robotik – Assistenzroboter und soziale Roboter in der Pflege
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: care robot elderly nursing social robot assistive
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Robotics"[MeSH Terms] OR "robot"[Title/Abstract] OR "robotic"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "elderly care"[Title/Abstract] OR "elder care"[Title/Abstract] OR "older adults"[Title/Abstract] OR "long-term care"[Title/Abstract] OR "patient care"[Title/Abstract]) OR "care robot"[Title/Abstract] OR "nursing robot"[Title/Abstract] OR "social robot"[Title/Abstract]

keyword_groups.label: Robotik – Exoskelette und motorische Rehabilitation
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Exoskeleton Device"[MeSH Terms] OR "exoskeleton"[Title/Abstract] OR "powered orthosis"[Title/Abstract]) AND (rehabilitation[Title/Abstract] OR nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "patient mobility"[Title/Abstract] OR "physical therapy"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: digitale Pflegedokumentation – KI und NLP
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: natural language processing nursing clinical documentation NLP
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Natural Language Processing"[MeSH Terms] OR "natural language processing"[Title/Abstract] OR "speech recognition"[Title/Abstract] OR "text mining"[Title/Abstract] OR "NLP"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "clinical documentation"[Title/Abstract] OR "electronic health record"[Title/Abstract] OR "nursing record"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: digitale Pflegedokumentation – EHR und klinische Entscheidungsunterstützung
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: clinical decision support system nursing EHR artificial intelligence
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Decision Support Systems, Clinical"[MeSH Terms] OR "clinical decision support"[Title/Abstract] OR "decision support system"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "nurse"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("Electronic Health Records"[MeSH Terms] AND nursing[Title/Abstract] AND ("artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "machine learning"[Title/Abstract]))

keyword_groups.label: technische Assistenzsysteme – Sensorik und Monitoring
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: wearable sensor IoT patient monitoring nursing elderly
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Wearable Electronic Devices"[MeSH Terms] OR "wearable"[Title/Abstract] OR "sensor"[Title/Abstract] OR "remote monitoring"[Title/Abstract] OR "internet of things"[Title/Abstract] OR "IoT"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "patient monitoring"[Title/Abstract] OR "elderly"[Title/Abstract] OR "older adults"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: technische Assistenzsysteme – Smart Home und Ambient Assisted Living
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: smart home ambient assisted living elderly dementia technology
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Smart Home"[Title/Abstract] OR "ambient assisted living"[Title/Abstract] OR "AAL"[Title/Abstract] OR "home automation"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "elderly"[Title/Abstract] OR "dementia"[Title/Abstract] OR "aging in place"[Title/Abstract] OR "older adults"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: KI in der Pflegeausbildung und Simulation
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: artificial intelligence nursing education simulation virtual reality
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Education, Nursing"[MeSH Terms] OR "nursing education"[Title/Abstract] OR "nursing training"[Title/Abstract] OR "nursing simulation"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "virtual reality"[Title/Abstract] OR "simulation"[Title/Abstract] OR "chatbot"[Title/Abstract] OR "e-learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "digital"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: Telemedizin und digitale Fernpflege
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: telenursing telehealth remote nursing mHealth digital care
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Telemedicine"[MeSH Terms] OR "Telenursing"[MeSH Terms] OR "telenursing"[Title/Abstract] OR "telehealth nursing"[Title/Abstract] OR "mHealth"[Title/Abstract] OR "mobile health"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "nurse"[Title/Abstract] OR "patient"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: Computer Vision und Bildanalyse in der Pflege
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: computer vision wound care patient monitoring deep learning nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Computer Vision"[Title/Abstract] OR "image recognition"[Title/Abstract] OR "deep learning imaging"[Title/Abstract] OR "convolutional neural network"[Title/Abstract]) AND (nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "wound care"[Title/Abstract] OR "pain assessment"[Title/Abstract] OR "patient monitoring"[Title/Abstract] OR "skin lesion"[Title/Abstract])

keyword_groups.label: KI und Pflegeprozess – Gesamtüberblick
keyword_groups.arxiv_term: artificial intelligence machine learning nursing care informatics
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Artificial Intelligence"[MeSH Terms] OR "Machine Learning"[MeSH Terms] OR "artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "machine learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "deep learning"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("Nursing"[MeSH Terms] OR nursing[Title/Abstract] OR "nurse"[Title/Abstract])
